dimensions.name: testability
dimensions.evidence: All 6 specs use concrete pass/fail conditions: file existence, line counts (<=80), exact text presence, command format, YAML field checks, function calls, return codes. No subjective language found in any refined AC.

dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.evidence: All 6 deliverables from definition.yaml have corresponding spec files with refined ACs: gate-check-hook-fix (6 ACs vs 4 in definition), transition-simplification (8 vs 5), review-consent-isolation (3 vs 3, with exact text quotations added), enforcement-wiring (5 vs 5, with instruction text detail), specialist-reasoning-upgrade (16 vs 6, with phased approach), specialist-expansion (8 vs 6, with format specifications).

dimensions.name: consistency
dimensions.evidence: File ownership matches across definition.yaml, plan.json, and all specs. Specialist assignments match (harness-engineer for 4 deliverables, complexity-skeptic for specialist-reasoning-upgrade, systems-architect for specialist-expansion). Wave ordering in plan.json (1-4) is consistent with dependency chains in specs. No contradictions found between specs -- enforcement-wiring and review-consent-isolation both touch skills/review.md but address different sections and are correctly sequenced (wave 2 then wave 3). transition-simplification acknowledges gate-check-hook-fix must complete first (wave 1 vs wave 4).

dimensions.name: implementability
dimensions.evidence: All 6 specs include Interface Contract sections with file paths, function names, and caller information. Behavior descriptions include: gate-check-hook-fix (input/output contract, decision tree for --request vs --confirm), transition-simplification (9-step sequential behavior, positional arg format, exit codes), review-consent-isolation (exact text to add, section location at lines 38-46), enforcement-wiring (exact MUST-level instruction text, section locations), specialist-reasoning-upgrade (4-phase process with litmus test and decision trees per specialist), specialist-expansion (exact YAML formats, line budgets per section, framework-agnosticism guidance).

dimensions.name: seed-sync
dimensions.evidence: seed_id=furrow-fed8, current step=spec, expected seed status=speccing, actual seed status=speccing (from sds show output). Seed is not closed (closed_at=null).
